title: The Aster Veil
subtitle: A frontier command chart for luminous trouble
description: A polished public-beta sample map with revealed worlds, hidden threats, and discoverable sensor contacts.

factions.name: Aster Accord
factions.description: A pragmatic coalition of settled ports, navigators, and survey courts.

factions.name: Veil Freeholds
factions.description: Independent habitats that trade favors, salvage, and silence.

factions.name: Helios Compact
factions.description: Corporate science enclaves with pristine ships and carefully redacted manifests.

factions.name: Blackline Directorate
factions.description: A classified interdiction authority known only to the GM.

systems.name: Crown of Aster
systems.description: The administrative heart of the region, ringed by pearlescent habitats and courier traffic.
systems.notes: Use for command briefings, political bargaining, and refit scenes.

systems.name: Vesper Anchorage
systems.description: A freehold station built through the ribs of a derelict ark, bright with docking strobes.
systems.notes: Neutral ground. Everyone is listening, especially the people who say they are not.

systems.name: Greenward
systems.description: A garden colony under mirrored weather shields, famed for bio-reactor exports.
systems.notes: Great place to hide experimental contamination under corporate hospitality.

systems.name: Kestral Gate
systems.description: A ragged frontier transit cluster where beacon data often arrives late or wrong.
systems.notes: Escalate encounters here when the crew thinks they are nearly safe.

systems.name: Red Wake
systems.description: A classified interdiction zone wrapped in military silence.
systems.notes: Reveal after the convoy ambush. Route access implies someone inside helped.

systems.name: Echo Vault
systems.description: A dormant megastructure fragment broadcasting low-frequency mathematical noise.
systems.notes: Players initially see ???. Discovery should feel like the map itself wakes up.

systems.name: Saltglass Ruins
systems.description: Shattered cities below reflective storm clouds, visible only between static surges.
systems.notes: Optional side mystery. Good place for a recovered archive or lost distress call.

routes.notes: Patrolled, busy, and easy to track.
Commercial lane with reliable nav buoys.
Radiation shear and pirate spoofing both complicate travel.
Sensor ghost only until the system is discovered.
Hidden military corridor. Revealing it changes the campaign board.
Known by salvors, denied by everyone official.
